case_number: Criminal Bail Application No. S-07 of 2026

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Bail Application No. S-07 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.48/2026. 2. For order on office objections. 3. For order on M.A No.49/ 2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 09.01.2026 Mr. Tarique Mehmood Arain advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate for the applicant. = Applicant Sahibzada Yaqoob Khan s/o Selani Khan, holding C.N.I.C No.441046-271943-7, is present in person. Mr. Tarique Mehmood Arain advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate for the applicant, under instructions of the person standing in the Court, does not press this Criminal Protective Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
